# MPSGraphResizeNearestRoundingMode.roundPreferFloor

**Case**

Rounds values to the nearest integer value, with 0.5f rounding toward -inf.

## Declaration

```swift
case roundPreferFloor
```
title: MPSGraphResizeNearestRoundingMode.roundPreferFloor
